action.description: Avoid routine neoadjuvant chemotherapy or anti-HER2 agents outside a clinical trial for small node-negative HER2-positive disease.

documentation.citation: Do not routinely offer neoadjuvant chemotherapy or anti-HER2 agents for T1a N0 or T1b N0 HER2-positive disease outside a clinical trial. Evidence: korde-et-al-2021-neoadjuvant-chemotherapy-endocrine-therapy-and-targeted-therapy-for-breast-cancer-asco-guideline_pdf: The Bottom Line, Recommendation 5.2
documentation.label: claim-r5-2

action.title: Do not routinely offer neoadjuvant chemotherapy or anti-HER2 therapy for T1a or T1b N0 HER2-positive disease

description: Choose anti-HER2-based neoadjuvant therapy for HER2-positive disease.
name: AscoBreastCancerGuidelineRecommendationR52SmallHer2Positive
title: Do not routinely offer neoadjuvant chemotherapy or anti-HER2 therapy for T1a or T1b N0 HER2-positive disease
